name: n8n-automation-kit
description: Comprehensive 4-tier skill kit for fully automated n8n workflow building. Agent-agnostic, portable, and shareable.
author: Turti

1-orchestrators.description: Task routing & intent detection. Auto-loaded on every session.

2-hubs.description: Core workflow lifecycle hubs. Loaded on demand by orchestrator.

3-utilities.description: Technical utilities and integrations. Loaded by hubs as needed.

4-domains.description: Domain-specific patterns. Loaded when project type is detected.
